transactions.desc: Lazar was optioned to Triple-A Lehigh Valley following Sunday night's 6-2 win over the Mets, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.
Wilson was designated for assignment by the Phillies on Sunday night, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.
Zazueta was promoted to Double-A Tulsa on Sunday, Kiley McDaniel of ESPN.com reports.
Gillen was promoted to Double-A Montgomery on Sunday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
Leon was outrighted to Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday, Lindsay Crosby of BravesToday.com reports.
The Angels released Walker on Saturday.
The Guardians outrighted Valera to Triple-A Columbus on Sunday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
Rodriguez was optioned to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre after Sunday's 4-1 loss to the Reds.
The Rockies designated Peralta for assignment Sunday.
The Rockies selected Brebbia's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Diamondbacks designated Diaz for assignment Sunday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Abner to Triple-A Reno on Sunday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Drake from Triple-A Reno on Sunday.
The Athletics selected Krook's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Sunday.
The Athletics optioned Williams to Triple-A Las Vegas on Sunday.
The Rays reinstated Grove (shoulder) from the 60-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
The Athletics designated Barlow for assignment Sunday.
The Padres designated Solak for assignment Sunday.
The Diamondbacks selected Cabrera's contract from Triple-A Reno to start Sunday's game versus the Twins.
The Athletics selected Meneses' contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Sunday, and he's batting sixth as the designated hitter against the Angels.
The Rangers recalled Corniell from Triple-A Round Rock on Sunday.
The Marlins selected Navarreto's contract from Triple-A Jacksonville on Sunday.
The Padres reinstated Andujar (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Sunday.
The Marlins reinstated Conine (hamstring) from the 60-day injured list Sunday. He'll start in right field and bat second in the Marlins' series finale against the Giants.
The Marlins designated Morel for assignment Sunday.
The White Sox optioned Davis to Triple-A Charlotte on Sunday.
The White Sox reinstated Hicks (lat) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Twins reinstated Rojas (triceps) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
Minnesota designated Lawrence for assignment Sunday.
The Yankees recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre ahead of his scheduled start Sunday against the Reds in New York.
